originalMarkdown:
# Lumina — Market Opportunity Pitch Deck

## Series A Strategy Overview

- Baseline pitch deck prepared for Series A product strategy review.
- Mobile creative tool market target defined across iOS and Android ecosystem.
- Basic freemium subscription model with $9.99/mo starter tier.

## Growth Baseline

- User acquisition baseline focused on organic social referrals.
- Competitor breakdown highlighting standard desktop design software gaps.
updatedMarkdown:
# Lumina — $4.2B Creative Economy Opportunity

## Target Audience & Market Size

- **TAM & SAM Expansion**: $4.2B Serviceable Addressable Market driven by 45M active Gen-Z digital creators and indie hackers.
- **Viral Creator Loops**: Organic invite velocity reached `1.42 K-Factor` across closed beta cohorts (68% 30-day retention).

## Monetization & Creator Revenue Model

- **Creator Revenue Split**: `70/30 Tier Split` for custom component kits & interactive canvas templates.
- **Indie Monetization**: Integrated micro-transactions and tokenized design asset trading built into mobile checkout.

originalMarkdown:
## Section 2: First-Time User Experience (FTUE)

The initial onboarding sequence introduces new users to the mobile application layout.

- **Account Signup**: Email and social login buttons on landing screen.
- **Permissions Prompt**: Push notification request after account creation.
- **Tutorial Overlay**: 5 static walkthrough cards explaining UI controls.
- **Workspace Setup**: Prompt user to enter their team or project name.
- **Default Canvas**: Open blank grid canvas upon tutorial completion.
updatedMarkdown:
## Section 2: Guided 3-Step Activation & Frictionless FTUE

Specification for frictionless zero-state onboarding engineered to achieve immediate creator time-to-value under 60 seconds.

- **Step 1: Express Persona Setup**: Single-tap interest picker (UI Design, Prototyping, AI Art) populates personalized starter kits.
- **Step 2: Magic Canvas Starter**: 1-click prompt helper generates fully interactive micro-app preview in `< 42 seconds`.
- **Step 3: One-Tap Social Share**: Instant web preview link generator creates shareable canvas card with built-in remix badge.
- **Friction Reduction Metrics**: Eliminating upfront mandatory password setup boosted signup conversion from `48%` to `84%`.
- **Progressive Profiling**: Auth dialog deferred until user attempts to export or invite collaborators to their live space.
- **Interactive Micro-Tips**: Non-blocking tooltips highlight pinch-to-zoom and multi-finger spatial canvas gestures on demand.

originalMarkdown:
# Lumina Canvas — Touch Gesture Baseline

## Basic Touch Controls

- Panning supported via single finger drag on empty canvas background.
- Zooming controlled through standard pinch gesture scaling.

## Selection Handles

- Selected objects display basic boundary bounding box handles.
- Undo and redo triggered via top navigation toolbar buttons.
updatedMarkdown:
# Lumina Canvas — 120Hz Spatial Touch Architecture

## Touch Latency & Spring Physics

- **Inertial Spring Panning**: Natural friction physics curve with dynamic rubber-banding boundaries (`dampening ratio: 0.82`).
- **Multi-Finger Pinch Zoom**: Smooth scale interpolation spanning `10% to 800%` with adaptive grid resolution auto-switching.

## Co-Presence & Haptic Feedback

- **Multi-User Co-Presence**: Live collaborator cursors rendered with spring-physics motion trails and subtle avatar tooltips.
- **Tactile Haptic Feedback**: Contextual micro-haptics trigger on snap-to-grid alignment (`25ms crisp vibration pattern`).

originalMarkdown:
## Section 4: AI Assistant Interface

- AI prompt bar displayed at bottom of canvas viewport.
- User submits text query to trigger automated layout suggestions.
- Results returned as static image previews for user selection.
- Rate limiting caps queries at 10 prompts per session.
updatedMarkdown:
## Section 4: Real-Time AI Prompt Co-Pilot & Streaming Engine

Specification for context-aware inline design assistant operating directly on active workspace canvas nodes.

- **Context-Aware Prompt Suggestions**: Auto-suggest bar infers next layout steps based on selected design element types.
- **Streaming Live Code Engine**: Renders interactive React component previews incrementally with `< 200ms` first-token latency.
- **HSL Dark Surface Tokens**: High-contrast dark theme optimized for creative focus (`hsl(220, 18%, 10%)` canvas background).
- **Non-Blocking Execution Sandbox**: Code generator runs in isolated iframe thread to maintain 60 FPS UI interaction speed.
- **Versioned AI Diffing**: Side-by-side visual diff allows product designers to compare AI-generated variations before accepting.
- **Custom Style Guardrails**: System prompt automatically injects team design system tokens (`border-radius`, typography, color palette).

# Product Growth — Referral Loop Baseline

## Basic Referral Mechanism

- Referral links generated in user profile account settings tab.
- Invite contacts via standard system share sheet dialog.

## Launch Milestones

- Referrer receives email confirmation when invitee signs up.
- Marketing campaign planned for public launch milestone.
updatedMarkdown:
# Product Growth — 1.42 K-Factor Viral Referral Engine

## Viral Invite Loops & Social Proof

- **Dynamic OG Social Cards**: Real-time snapshot API generates high-res social thumbnail cards featuring creator's custom app.
- **Bi-Directional Unlock Rewards**: Inviting 3 collaborators unlocks `Lumina Creator Pro` AI features for both referrer & invitee.

## Ecosystem Network Effects

- **In-App Remix Attribution**: Every exported micro-app contains embedded `Built with Lumina` attribution badge driving inbound traffic.
- **Design Community Showcase**: Weekly curated creator feed highlights trending community apps, driving organic discovery.

originalMarkdown:
## Section 3: Design Tokens & Typography

- Font family set to default system font stack.
- Font sizes specified in fixed pixel dimensions across views.
- Color palette includes primary blue, light grey background, dark text.
- Standard shadow utility classes applied to card containers.
updatedMarkdown:
## Section 3: Adaptive HSL Token Architecture & Glass UI

Design tokens engineered for cross-platform fidelity, seamless light/dark auto-switching, and spatial visual hierarchy.

- **Fluid Clamp Typography Scale**: Uses CSS `clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 1.75rem)` for smooth typography scaling across foldable and desktop screens.
- **Glassmorphism Layer Tokens**: Floating drawers use `backdrop-filter: blur(12px)` with `hsla(0, 0%, 100%, 0.75)` subtle frosted borders.
- **Accessible Color Palette**:
  - Primary Electric Accent: `hsl(250, 95%, 64%)` — Vivid Indigo (8.4:1 contrast ratio against dark mode canvas)
  - Surface Neutral: `hsl(220, 20%, 97%)` in Light Mode / `hsl(224, 18%, 12%)` in Dark Mode
  - Interactive Hover Glow: `hsl(250, 100%, 75%)` subtle ring focus outline
- **Micro-Interaction Timings**: Hover transitions and card lifts standardized at `180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)`.
- **Gloved & Touch Target Baseline**: All primary action buttons enforce minimum `48px × 48px` hit target with 8px touch padding.
